guidance_documents.instructions: The vendor assessment has been completed and cleared for FAST_TRACK approval. Your role is to provide procurement approval for this Class C, TIER_1 integration. The assessment confirms: data classification is UNREGULATED, no DPA is required, NDA is EXECUTED, and the integration type is EXPORT_ONLY. No security blockers or follow-up actions are required from your domain. Your approval, along with Business Owner / Manager sign-off, will complete the onboarding checklist and clear the vendor for integration. Estimated completion: 2-3 business days.
next_steps: Review and approve vendor procurement request per FAST_TRACK approval path (PAM-001 row C-T1)
Confirm procurement sign-off within 2-3 business days
Coordinate with Business Owner / Manager to align approval timeline
